# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of Change

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Scenario addition
- [ ] Infrastructure update
- [ ] Script or automation update
- [ ] Reference update
- [ ] Diagram update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

- [ ] Main README

## What Changed?

Explain the specific changes made in this pull request.

## Why This Change Matters

Explain why this change improves the cyber range.

Examples:

- Makes the range easier to rebuild
- Improves documentation clarity
- Adds a new training scenario
- Improves SOC visibility
- Adds safety guidance
- Fixes incorrect setup steps
- Supports future automation

## Testing / Validation

Describe how this change was tested or reviewed.

- [ ] I tested the steps in the lab
- [ ] I reviewed the documentation for accuracy
- [ ] I checked links and file paths
- [ ] I confirmed screenshots are accurate
- [ ] Testing was not required for this change

## Screenshots

Add screenshots if they help explain or prove the change.

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] This change does not include real passwords
- [ ] This change does not include private keys or tokens
- [ ] This change does not expose sensitive infrastructure details
- [ ] This change is limited to authorized lab use
- [ ] Any offensive/security tooling is clearly scoped to the cyber range
- [ ] Reset or rollback notes are included when needed

## Documentation Checklist

- [ ] File names are clear
- [ ] Markdown formatting is readable
- [ ] Steps are written clearly
- [ ] Relevant folders were updated
- [ ] References were added if needed

## Additional Notes

Add any extra context here.
